english translation text: QABR MAI AHMED MURSAL KO SATAAIA KISNEWho tormented Prophet (pbuh) in his grave?English Transliteration

urdu transliteration text:
QABR MAI AHMED MURSAL KO SATAAIA KISNEFATIMA ZAHRA KO DARBAAR BULAAIA KISNE
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Who tormented Prophet (pbuh) in his grave?
Who called Bibi Fatima (s.a.) to the court of the ruler?

urdu transliteration text:
NAAM NE LENAI SAI CHUPJAAIE GI TAAREEKH BALAAJALTEY DARWAZAI KO ZAHRA PAI GHIRAIA KISNEY
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Will history be concealed by not naming people,
Who broke down the burning door on Fatima (s.a.)?
Who planned to be disrespectful to her?

urdu transliteration text:
HAATH MAI LEKAI CHALI FATIMA TEHREER NABI CHAAK KARNAI KEYLIYE HAATH BARAAIA KISNE
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Hazrat Fatima (s.a.) walked with the letter of the Prophet (pbuh) in her hand,
Who refused to accept the will of the Prophet (pbuh)?

urdu transliteration text:
AAIA HASNAIN O ALI HAQ KI GAWAAHI KELIYEHAQ BAJAANIB THY TAU KHAAMOSH KARAAIA KISNE
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Imam Ali (a.s.) and Hasnain (a.s) came forward to testify for the truth,
The truth was on their side, who silenced them?

urdu transliteration text:
ALMIYA BAAGH FIDAK BAAD MUHAMMAD KAI HUWAZEHR KHATOON KAI BABA KO PILAIAA KIS NE
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
The tragedy of Fadak happened after the passing away of the Prophet (s.a),
Who hurt the Prophet (s.a.) during and after his lifetime?
Who accused him of not being in his senses?

urdu transliteration text:
POOCH FAIAAZ FAKAT ITNA SITAMGAR SAI SAWAALALLAI AHMED PAI SITAM DHAANA CIKHAAIA KISNE
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Oh people! Ask the this question to the oppressor,
Who oppressed the family of the Prophet (pbuh)?
